name: Roast Lung Kong Chicken
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Peanut oil for deep frying
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch the chicken halves in boiling water for 2 minutes. Drain.
2. Place the bird halves in a pot with the louring sauce ingredients and bring to a boil until covered with the sauce.
3. Turn off the heat and simmer lightly for 15 minutes, then allow the halves to cool in the sauce.
4. Remove and place on a rack on the counter. Pat dry with paper towels.
5. Using an electric fan, aim at the bird halves for about 3 hours, or until the skin is dry to the touch.
6. Deep fry one half at a time in oil at 350 degrees. Be very careful when sliding the half into the hot oil.
7. Drain on paper towels before cutting up to serve.
